videos.title: The agent-ready web: Simplify user actions with WebMCP — Tara Agyemang, Google
videos.summary: Keep your development skills ahead of the curve by understanding how AI agents will soon navigate and interact with the web. This Google developer presentation introduces WebMCP, providing fullstack engineers with actionable insights into structuring future-proof user actions.

videos.title: How to Quit Your Job (and Find Work You Actually Love)
videos.summary: Navigating your early career can feel overwhelming, especially when weighing job satisfaction against security. Ali Abdaal delivers a structured, science-backed framework to analyze your current role and plan a risk-mitigated path toward work you truly enjoy.

videos.title: Astro gagal siar World Cup, tanda kejatuhan gergasi TV Malaysia?
videos.summary: Learn from the strategic missteps of a Malaysian entertainment giant. This detailed business and financial breakdown of Astro offers invaluable, real-world lessons on market disruption, changing consumer behavior, and the critical importance of digital adaptability.

videos.title: Saham patuh syariah selamat?
videos.summary: As an advocate for ethical wealth, understanding the structural safety and risk profiles of Shariah-compliant investments is essential. This concise analysis explains whether halal-certified stocks offer safer, more stable returns during macroeconomic volatility in Malaysia.

videos.title: Are You Sincere? | Snapshots with Imam Tom Facchine
videos.summary: Building a rewarding career starts with aligning your personal intentions. This highly reflective talk by Imam Tom Facchine explains how to anchor your work in true Islamic sincerity (Ikhlas), converting your daily professional tasks into acts of personal worship.

videos.title: #104 | Is The Unity Government Working? | Idris & Leon Jala
videos.summary: Gain critical economic foresight with corporate turnaround expert Idris Jala as he dissects Malaysia's current governance performance. Understanding these national policies is vital for young professionals navigating local market opportunities and evaluating the trajectory of the country's business landscape.

videos.title: #105 | Building Malaysia's Largest Stroke Rehab Network (Janet Yeo)
videos.summary: Ever wondered what it truly takes to build a significant, impactful venture from the ground up right here in Malaysia? This episode dives deep into Janet Yeo's journey, offering invaluable lessons on entrepreneurship, resilience, and scaling a network that truly serves a critical need in our community. Get ready to be inspired and learn practical strategies for making your mark.

videos.title: #103 | Malaysia's RM300K EV Policy | Idris & Leon Jala
videos.summary: How will Malaysia's significant EV policy impact your financial planning, investment opportunities, and even the future of technology in our country? This discussion with Idris and Leon Jala breaks down the economic implications of the RM300K EV policy, offering insights vital for an Islamic financial advocate and any forward-thinking professional. Don't miss this deep dive into a policy set to reshape our automotive and economic landscape.

videos.title: The not-so-rare world of rare diseases | Zhenghong Gao | TEDxApex
videos.summary: Dive into the overlooked yet surprisingly common world of rare diseases and discover the profound impact of dedicated advocacy and scientific pursuit. This talk encourages a mindset of empathy and persistent problem-solving, skills invaluable for a junior engineer looking to tackle complex challenges or anyone seeking to make a difference in niche, critical areas. It's a reminder that even the 'rare' can hold universal lessons.

videos.title: How to Find Clarity When the World Feels Loud | Mikaya Thurmond | TEDxNCState
videos.summary: Feeling overwhelmed by decisions, distractions, and the constant noise of the modern world, especially early in your career? Mikaya Thurmond offers powerful strategies to cut through the clutter and cultivate profound mental clarity. This is essential viewing for any junior professional or aspiring leader looking to sharpen their focus, make better choices, and navigate their path with confidence.

videos.title: Start with the lifestyle you want - from Professor @CalNewportMedia
videos.summary: This video challenges you to define your ideal lifestyle before diving into the grind of a junior dev role. It’s essential viewing for aligning your career path with your personal principles and long-term well-being.

videos.title: From prompt to a fully working real-time voice app in seconds. 🎙️✨
videos.summary: See how to move from a simple prompt to a functional, real-time voice application in mere seconds. This is a must-watch for any dev wanting to integrate cutting-edge AI features into their stack quickly.

videos.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
videos.summary: Discover the latest in real-time translation tech that could break down language barriers in your collaborative projects. Staying ahead of these tools is critical for any developer aiming to stay competitive in the global market.

videos.title: The Math Behind Every $100K Business
videos.summary: This video is a goldmine for junior developers and early-career professionals looking to transition from trading time for money to building scalable income streams. By breaking down the specific math required to reach a $100K milestone, Ali provides a clear, actionable roadmap that helps you demystify business growth and start treating your side projects or freelancing gigs as a serious, strategic business.
